mapper.select: SELECT * FROM farm_printer WHERE mac_address = #{macAddress} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM farm_printer WHERE ip_address = #{ipAddress} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE farm_printer SET ip_address = NULL, status = 'OFFLINE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE ip_address = #{ipAddress} AND (mac_address IS NULL OR mac_address != #{excludeMac})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farm_printer ( name, ip_address, mac_address, firmware_type, api_key, status, current_material, nozzle_size, machine_number, grid_row, grid_col, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{ipAddress}, #{macAddress}, #{firmwareType}, #{apiKey}, #{status}, #{currentMaterial}, #{nozzleSize}, #{machineNumber}, #{gridRow}, #{gridCol}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ip_address = VALUES(ip_address), status = VALUES(status), firmware_type = VALUES(firmware_type), api_key = VALUES(api_key), machine_number = VALUES(machine_number), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO farm_printer ( name, ip_address, mac_address, firmware_type, api_key, status, current_material, nozzle_size, machine_number, grid_row, grid_col, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.name}, #{item.ipAddress}, #{item.macAddress}, #{item.firmwareType}, #{item.apiKey}, #{item.status}, #{item.currentMaterial}, #{item.nozzleSize}, #{item.machineNumber}, #{item.gridRow}, #{item.gridCol}, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ip_address = VALUES(ip_address), status = VALUES(status), firmware_type = VALUES(firmware_type), api_key = VALUES(api_key), machine_number = VALUES(machine_number), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE farm_printer SET ip_address = #{ipAddress}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE mac_address = #{macAddress}
UPDATE farm_printer SET grid_row = #{gridRow}, grid_col = #{gridCol}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, machine_number AS machineNumber, ip_address AS ipAddress, mac_address AS macAddress, status FROM farm_printer WHERE grid_row IS NULL AND grid_col IS NULL
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR machine_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_at DESC
